response.justification: Bogdan brings 19+ years of software engineering experience across multiple domains and currently works on AI-agent infrastructure at Naver, meeting the baseline experience requirement. However, he lacks the preferred Master's/PhD in AI and shows limited demonstrated expertise building AI products or platforms at scale. His recent entry into AI work is promising but requires clarification on depth of AI/ML expertise and strategic product vision to assess true fit for this director-level AI strategy role.
strengths: 19+ years of software engineering spanning web, mobile, desktop, cloud, and infrastructure systems
Current role involves AI-agent infrastructure and emerging AI technologies (MCP frameworks)
Multi-domain technical depth and builder mentality demonstrated through founding and maintaining platforms like GISCollective
concerns: No advanced degree in AI/ML—lacks preferred Master's or PhD qualification
Limited demonstrated track record building AI products or platforms; recent Naver AI work is too new to assess impact
Career has been primarily backend/infrastructure-focused rather than strategic product direction and customer-facing AI innovation
